extensionDescription.message: Saves images, videos, audio, links, selected text, and pages to folders inside your default download folder.

translationCredits.description: Credits for translations. Leave ​ for blank. Eg. sv translation by @username <email or url>, Real Name <contact>

genericUnknownError.description: A generic error message used as a fallback

contextMenuItemOptions.description: Title of context menu item that opens the options menu when clicked.

contextMenuExclusive.description: Name for menu item when in exclusive mode.

contextMenuRoot.description: Name for root context menu item.

contextMenuLastUsed.description: Placeholder title for last used option.

contextMenuContextMedia.description: Indicator that Save In is saving just media.

contextMenuContextMediaOrLink.description: Indicator that Save In is saving a media or link.

contextMenuContextSelection.description: Indicator that Save In is saving a selection.

contextMenuContextPage.description: Indicator that Save In is saving a page.

contextMenuShowDefaultFolder.description: Title of context menu item that opens the default downloads directory in the system file manager when clicked.

notificationSuccessTitle.description: Notification title for a successful download

notificationFailureTitle.description: Notification title for a failed download

notificationRuleMatchedTitle.description: Notification title for a rule match

notificationRuleMatchFailedExclusiveTitl.message: Save In: Failed to route or rename download
notificationRuleMatchFailedExclusiveTitl.description: Notification title for no rule matches when in exclusive mode

notificationRuleMatchFailedExclusiveMess.description: Notification title for no rule matches when in exclusive mode

ruleMissingMatcher.message: Add at least one matcher clause
ruleMissingMatcher.description: Error message for missing matcher in rule

ruleCaptureMissingMatcher.message: Capture clause does not target a matcher
ruleCaptureMissingMatcher.description: Error message for capture targeting missing matcher

ruleMissingCapture.message: Add a capture clause to use capture variables
ruleMissingCapture.description: Error message for missing capture clause in rule

ruleMultipleCapture.message: A rule can contain only one capture clause
ruleMultipleCapture.description: Error message for multiple capture clauses in rule

ruleMissingInto.message: Add at least one into: clause
ruleMissingInto.description: Error message for missing into clause in rule

ruleExtraInto.message: A rule can contain only one into: clause
ruleExtraInto.description: Error message for multiple into clauses in rule

ruleUnknownMatcher.description: Error message for an unknown matcher

ruleInvalidRegex.description: Error message for a rule with invalid regex

ruleShadowed.message: This rule never runs because an earlier rule matches the same or more downloads
ruleShadowed.description: Warning for a routing rule shadowed by an earlier rule

ruleBadClause.description: Error message for lines in rule with syntax errors

rulePathInvalidCharacter.description: Error message for rules with invalid characters in path

rulePathStartsWithDot.description: Error message for paths in routing rules that start with invalid characters

tabstripMenuSelectedTab.description: Tabstrip context menu label for saving selected tab

tabstripMenuMultipleSelectedTab.description: Tabstrip context menu label for saving one or more highlighted tab

tabstripMenuSaveChildrenTabs.message: Save tabs opened from this tab
tabstripMenuSaveChildrenTabs.description: Tabstrip context menu label for saving child tabs

tabstripMenuSaveRightTabs.message: Save this tab and all tabs to its right
tabstripMenuSaveRightTabs.description: Tabstrip context menu label for saving tabs to the right (inclusive)

tabstripMenuSaveRightTabsMatched.message: Save this tab and all tabs to its right (routing rule required)
tabstripMenuSaveRightTabsMatched.description: Tabstrip context menu label for saving tabs to the right (inclusive) that match a route

o_sDownloads.description: o prefixes are for options page text, s prefix are for section/subsection titles

o_lContextMenuBehaviorHelp.message: Choose which Save In actions appear in context menus.

o_lAlsoAskWhen.message: Also ask where to save when:

o_lBrowserDownloadsHelp.message: Optionally track or route downloads started by web pages or the browser. Downloads started by Save In or another extension are excluded.

o_cTrackBrowserDownloads.message: Include ordinary browser downloads in Save In history

o_cTrackBrowserDownloadsHelp.message: Records matching downloads in Save In history without taking ownership of them. They are not retried and do not trigger Save In prompts or notifications.

o_cRouteBrowserDownloads.message: Use routing rules for browser downloads

o_cRouteBrowserDownloadsHelp.message: When supported, matching rules can rename browser downloads or place them in subfolders. Unmatched downloads are unchanged.

o_cRouteBrowserDownloadsFirefox.message: Experimentally reroute matching downloads on Firefox

o_cRouteBrowserDownloadsFirefoxHelp.message: Firefox lacks native filename routing, so Save In cancels each matching download and starts a replacement. This can fail for POST requests, expiring URLs, custom headers, or authenticated downloads.

o_cBrowserDownloadFilterHelp.message: Leave blank to handle every browser download, or enter one WebExtension match pattern per line. This filter applies to history tracking and routing.

o_cBrowserDownloadExcludeFilterHelp.message: Enter one WebExtension match pattern per line. Exclusions override the matching URLs above and apply to both history tracking and routing.

o_lBrowserDownloadVariables.message: Browser downloads provide only the URL, proposed filename, current time, counter, UUID, and MIME variables. Page title, page URL, link text, selection, menu metadata, and key modifiers are unavailable.

o_lPageSourcesHelp.message: Browse images, video, audio, documents, and downloadable links found on the current page. Saved items use your normal routing and renaming rules.

o_lPageSourcesNetworkLimit.message: Some video players use temporary URLs or load media through scripts, so Save In may not detect every video. It can sometimes find streaming-video playlists (HLS/DASH), but these files only list the separate video pieces; saving one does not save the complete video.

o_cSourcePanelResourceHints.message: Look for streaming-video playlists (HLS/DASH; best effort)

o_cSourcePanelLinks.message: Include links, linked media, and PDF documents

o_lSourcePanelShortcutHelp.message: Use browser shortcut syntax, for example Ctrl+Shift+Y or Command+Shift+Y. The browser rejects reserved shortcuts.

o_lHistoryFilter.message: Filter by file, folder, type, or source

o_lMenuPreview.description: Heading for the live context-menu tree preview on the options page

o_lLiveVariables.description: Heading for the scrollable list of variables and their current values

o_lRuleBuilder.description: Caption above the guided rule input on the options page

o_lRuleTemplates.description: Summary label for the built-in rule templates list

o_lLanguageChangeFailed.message: Could not change the language. Try again.

o_lAccessKeysInstruction.message: Set access keys for Save In menu items.

o_cLastUsedMenu.description: c prefixes are for controls (buttons, etc)

o_cPreferLinks.message: Save the link target instead of embedded media

o_cSaveText.message: Show an action for selected text

o_cSavePage.message: Show an action for the current page

o_cSavePageHelp.message: Saves the page document only; images, stylesheets, and other external files are not included.

o_cSaveTabstrip.message: Show Save In actions in the tab menu

o_cSaveTabstripHelp.message: Saves a tab, tab group, or tabs to the right

o_cOpenDialogShift.message: You hold Shift while choosing a menu item

o_cOpenDialogIfNoRulesMatch.message: Ask where to save when no routing rules match

o_cExclusiveModeHelp.message: Hides the folder submenu and saves relative to the default download folder

o_cNotifyMatch.message: Notify when a routing rule matches

o_cSaveShortcutsTypeMacWebloc.description: Native macOS internet location shortcut format

o_cSaveShortcutsTabsInstead.message: Save tabs as shortcuts (from the tab context menu)

o_cKeyboardShortcutNumbers.message: Add number-key shortcuts to context submenu items

o_cKeyboardShortcutClickToHelp.message: Hold Alt by default and click an image or media item to save it to the last-used folder or default download folder. Save In adds a click listener to pages; some variables are unavailable.

o_cHostPermissionMissing.message: Save In cannot access page content. Grant access to all sites to use click-to-save.

o_cKeyboardShortcutModifierHelp.message: Hold the selected modifier keys while clicking the chosen mouse button. Choose None for both modifiers to use the mouse button alone. Changes apply to existing pages.

o_cReplaceInvalidCharsWithHelp.message: Leave blank to delete. Invalid replacement characters are ignored.

o_cAppendMimeExtension.message: Add an extension when the filename has none

o_cAppendMimeExtensionHelp.message: For URLs without an extension, derive one from the server's Content-Type. This adds a small delay only when needed.

o_cFallbackFetch.message: Retry failed downloads once in the background

o_cFallbackFetchHelp.message: Retries network or server errors before reporting failure.

o_cFetchViaFetchAPIHelp.message: Save In fetches the file and passes it to the browser. Use this only when normal downloads fail. It is slower, and Chrome holds the file in memory while saving, so avoid it for very large files.

o_cIncludeFetchCredentialsHelp.message: Includes applicable cookies and browser-managed sign-in when Save In fetches files in the background, including after redirects. Private-window requests remain anonymous. Direct browser downloads manage their own credentials.

o_cSetRefererHeader.message: Use the page URL as the Referer when missing

o_cSetRefererHeaderHelp.message: Firefox only. Some sites (e.g. pixiv.net) reject downloads without an HTTP Referer header. For matching downloads, Firefox sends the page URL directly as the Referer. Leave it off unless a site needs it.

o_cSetRefererHeaderFilter.message: Set the Referer for these sites

o_cSetRefererHeaderFilterHelp.message: One match pattern per line, e.g. *://i.pximg.net/*. The Referer is only set for downloads whose URL matches one of these.

optionsUnsavedChanges.message: Discard your unsaved changes, or keep editing?
optionsUnsavedChanges.description: Dialog shown when leaving a tab with unsaved editor changes

optionsEditorUnsaved.description: Status shown beside Apply and Discard for a modified manual editor

notificationLinkPreferred.description: Notification title when link was downloaded over a source

o_cPreferLinksFilterHelp.message: Enter one regular expression per line. Patterns are matched against the page URL.

notificationBadPreferLinksPattern.message: Invalid regular expression for preferred links

o_cNotifyLinkPreferred.message: Notify when a link target is downloaded instead of embedded media

o_cCloseTabOnSave.message: Close each tab after saving it

o_lManualEditorSaveHelp.message: Changes in this editor are saved when you select Apply.

o_lShortcutEnterOrReset.message: Enter a shortcut or use Reset.

o_lShortcutPrimaryModifier.message: Include Ctrl, Alt, Command, or MacCtrl as a modifier.

o_lShortcutAddKey.message: Add a key after the modifier.

o_lShortcutOneKey.message: Use one key with your modifiers.

o_lShortcutValidKey.message: Choose a valid key, such as Y, 5, F12, or PageDown.

o_lShortcutNoRepeats.message: Do not repeat keys or modifiers.

o_lShortcutChangeUnsupported.message: This browser does not support changing shortcuts here.

o_lShortcutRejected.message: The browser did not accept this shortcut. It may be reserved or in use.

o_lShortcutResetUnsupported.message: This browser does not support resetting shortcuts here.

o_lAccessKeyInvalid.message: Use one letter or number. Existing saved values remain supported until changed.

html_askAnAiAgentToDraftADownloadsMenu.message: Ask an AI agent to draft a folder menu

html_atTheEndForACommentStartWith.message: at the end for a comment; start with

html_browsersOnlyLetExtensionsSaveInside.message: Browsers only let extensions save inside the default

html_buildTheDestinationsAndSubmenusShow.message: Choose the folders and submenus shown in Save In's context menu.

html_copyThisPromptThenReplaceTheExample.message: Copy this prompt, then replace the example destinations.

html_createsTwoSelectableRowsInTheDownlo.message: Creates two folders in the Save locations menu.

html_eachLineAddsADestinationRelativeToY.message: Each line adds a destination relative to your browser's

html_oneRelativeDirectoryOrMenuInstructi.message: Enter one relative folder or menu instruction per line. Files are saved relative to the

html_toCreateNestedSubmenusUsingOne.message: to create nested submenus, using one

html_toReachAnotherLocationCreateASymlin.message: . To reach another location, create a symlink inside Downloads and use that relative symlink path as a destination. The target folder must already exist.

html_askAnAiAgentToDraftRoutingRules.message: Ask an AI agent to draft routing rules

html_automaticallyMoveOrRenameDownloadsW.message: Move or rename downloads automatically when their filename, source, page, or context matches.

html_copyThisPromptIntoAnAgentOrUseWebmc.message: Copy this prompt into an agent, or use WebMCP from External integrations.

html_destinationsAreRelativeToTheDownloa.message: Destinations are relative to the folder you selected. Matcher values are regular expressions; see the

html_enterOneUrlLikeBrowserMatchPatternP.message: Enter one URL-like browser match pattern per line. It has a scheme, host, and path:

html_everyMatcherInARuleMustMatch.message: Every matcher in a rule must match.

html_everyRuleMustEndWithAn.message: Every rule must end with an

html_forHttpAndHttpsAndEndWith.message: for HTTP and HTTPS, and end with

html_howDoDownloadUrlFiltersWork.message: How do download URL filters work?

html_moveMatchingFilesAndKeepTheirNames.message: Move matching files and keep their names

html_parenthesesCapturePartsOfAMatcherSe.message: Parentheses capture parts of a matcher. Select the matcher with

html_separateRulesWithABlankLine.message: Separate rules with a blank line.

html_toIncludeEveryPathThisIsNotARegular.message: to include every path. This is not a regular expression, and it cannot match query parameters or an explicit port.

html_copy0LeavesDismissalToTheBrowserOrO.message: 0 leaves dismissal to the browser or operating system.

html_mouseOnlyLeftClickWillReplaceNormal.message: Mouse-only left click will replace normal clicks on savable media and links while this feature is enabled.

html_previewOfThePageSourcesDrawer.message: Preview of the Page sources drawer

html_clickTheSnippetToCopyIt.message: Click the snippet to copy it.

html_exampleNegotiateTheVersionThenSaveA.message: Example: negotiate the version, then save a URL

html_letTrustedExtensionsSendUrlsThrough.message: Let trusted extensions send URLs through Save In's routing and renaming rules.

html_noExtensionsAreApprovedExternalDown.message: No extensions are approved. External downloads are blocked by default.

html_onlyApprovedExtensionsCanStartDownl.message: Only approved extensions can start downloads. Use the calling extension's ID—not Save In's ID.

html_theseExtensionsTriedToStartADownloa.message: These extensions tried to start a download. Add only callers you trust. Requested URLs are never stored.

html_useOneExtensionIdPerLineForBulkChan.message: Use one extension ID per line for bulk changes.

html_variableItAdvancesOncePerSavedDownl.message: variable. It advances once per saved download and persists across restarts.

html_webextensionsSuchAsFoxyGesturesCanM.message: WebExtensions such as Foxy Gestures can message Save In directly. A Greasemonkey, Tampermonkey, or Violentmonkey userscript cannot do so by itself: userscripts do not receive cross-extension messaging access. Use a small companion WebExtension as a relay, or have the userscript hand the URL to an extension that exposes that ability.

html_aWatercolorLuckyCatCarefullyOrganiz.message: A watercolor lucky cat carefully organizing documents, photographs, film, and books

html_findsAndSavesResourcesTheUserChoose.message: Finds and saves resources the user chooses on arbitrary websites.

html_keepsSettingsRoutingRulesLocalHisto.message: Keeps settings, routing rules, local history, and restart-safe state.

html_letsChromeConvertFetchedFileDataInt.message: Lets Chrome convert fetched file data into temporary download URLs.

html_messageFirstOrASmallRelayExtensionM.message: message, or a small relay extension must do so. Video DownloadHelper does not expose a stable integration API that Save In can call directly.

html_reportsCompletedSavesAndActionableF.message: Reports completed saves and actionable failures when enabled.

html_saveInDoesNotAdoptDownloadsThatAnot.message: Save In does not adopt downloads that another extension has already started, including Video DownloadHelper. The downloader must first send Save In a

html_saveInHasNoAnalyticsAdvertisingDeve.message: Save In has no analytics, advertising, developer-operated server, or remote executable code. Settings and history stay in browser-managed extension storage.

html_saveInIsALocalFirstDownloadsHelperF.message: Save In is a local-first download helper for organizing files with context-menu folders, routing rules, renaming, page sources, and download history.

html_saveInRegistersToolsAnAiAgentCanCal.message: , Save In registers tools that an AI agent can call while this options page is open—to change settings, build folder menus, and write routing rules.

html_showsSaveInCommandsOnPagesLinksMedi.message: Shows Save In commands on pages, links, media, and tabs.

html_startsSavesChoosesFilenamesMonitors.message: Starts saves, chooses filenames, monitors results, and supports retries.

html_theSessionLogBelowAlwaysKeepsASmall.message: The session log below always keeps a small local record of recent failures. Enable this only when troubleshooting with the browser developer console; it adds verbose internal details and resets to the saved setting after restart.

html_toConnectOpenThisPageInABrowserThat.message: To connect: open this page in a browser that supports WebMCP, keep it open, and point your in-browser agent at this tab. Ask it in plain language — e.g. “sort my downloads into folders by website and date, number each file, and notify me only when one fails.”

html_currentDatetimeAsAUnixTimestamp.message: Current date and time as a Unix timestamp

html_currentDatetimeAsAUtcIso8601String.message: Current date and time as a UTC ISO 8601 string

html_lastLabelOfTheSourceHostname.message: Last label of the source hostname

html_pathPartOfTheSourceUrlSeparatorsAre.message: Path part of the source URL (separators are sanitized)

html_theCurrentlySelectedTextOnThePage.message: The currently selected text on the page

html_theNaiveFilenameUrlBasedUseTheRouti.message: Filename derived from the URL. Use routing rules if this is inaccurate.

html_variablesAreUsedInDirectoryAndPathP.message: Variables are used in folder and filename patterns.

html_aRandomV4UuidUniquePerUse.message: A random v4 UUID, unique per use

html_autoIncrementingNumberThatAdvancesO.message: Number that increases after each saved download and persists across restarts. View or reset it under Download counter.

html_createsASeparatorInTheContextMenu.message: Creates a separator in the context menu

html_createsASubmenuItemAddMore.message: Creates a submenu item; add more

html_first12LowercaseHexCharactersOfTheD.message: First 12 lowercase hexadecimal characters of the downloaded file's SHA-256. Preparing this value fetches and hashes the file before saving, so it is blank in previews or when unavailable. The download continues if hashing fails. You can cancel a long preparation from History.

html_full64CharacterLowercaseSha256ItSha.message: Full 64-character lowercase SHA-256. It is calculated together with

html_handyForExtensionlessOrQuerySuffixe.message: . Useful for URLs without an extension or with a query suffix.

html_onlyUsableWhenRoutingAndRewritingFi.message: Available only when routing or renaming files

html_specialRowsUsedOnlyInTheDownloadsMe.message: Special rows used only in the Save locations menu

html_theUrlAfterFollowingRedirectsViaThe.message: The URL after following redirects. It uses the same request as

html_viaAHeadRequestAddsASmallDelayAnd.message: . This adds a small delay and is blank when unavailable.

html_clausesAreOnlyUsedInRuleDefinitions.message: Routing rules use clauses to decide which downloads to move or rename.

html_matchesTheCommentOfTheClickedMenuIt.message: Matches the selected menu item's comment.

html_matchesTheLinkTextOrElement.message: Matches the link text or the element's

html_matchesTheMenuIndexOfTheClickedMenu.message: Matches the selected menu item's index (1, 2, 3…).

html_matchesTheNaiveFilename.message: Matches the filename derived from the URL.

html_matchesTheResolvedFilenameExtension.message: Matches the resolved filename extension, including Content-Disposition.

html_matchesTheUrlDerivedExtensionLegacy.message: Matches the URL-derived extension (legacy name). Use

html_renamingTheFileKeepsItsOwnNameEG.message: renaming—the file keeps its current name (for example,

html_routesDownloadsToOrRewritesDownload.message: Moves a download to the given path or renames it with the given pattern. End with

html_selectsTheMatcherForRegexCaptureGro.message: Selects the matcher whose regular-expression capture groups are available as

html_stringsAddJavascriptRegexFlagsAfter.message: . Add JavaScript flags after the matcher name; for example, use
